---
title: "DevOps Showcase"
description: "A mix of DevOps skills relevant to a Data Science practitioner."
date: "2024-07-28"
categories: ["R", "DevOps", "Docker", "APIs"]
image: image-listing.jpg
format:
  html: 
    code-links:
      - text: "Repo"
        icon: github
        href: https://github.com/ozanozbeker/do4ds
---
